messages.content: I can answer questions, open apps or websites, generate images, play music, write content, search for information, schedule reminders, and save memories for you.
is there any reminder for me?

OK. I have scheduled a reminder for you with the details: title - Follow up with recruiter, date - 2024-02-16, time - 14:00, description - Follow up with recruiter about job application, location - Home.
Your wallet is in your jeans pocket, Sabari.
